title: Gustar-like verbs
subtitle: Use interesar, importar, parecer.
overview: Some verbs work like gustar: me interesa, me importa, me parece.
The thing controls singular or plural.

items.es: Me interesa mucho la cultura española.
items.en: Spanish culture interests me a lot.

items.es: No me importan los errores pequeños.
items.en: Small mistakes do not matter to me.

items.es: Me parece útil repetir las frases.
items.en: Repeating the sentences seems useful to me.

items.es: A Ana le interesan los idiomas.

items.en: Does this time seem good to you?
